extracted_items.supersedes_content: comfygit project is deployed on Heroku
extracted_items.content: comfygit project migrated from Heroku to Fly.io last week. All environments now on Fly.io.
comfygit primary deployment region is iad (US East). Singapore (sin) region is a potential future consideration for Asia coverage but not yet decided.

extracted_items.supersedes_content: comfygit API is currently on v2
extracted_items.content: comfygit API is on v3. API v2 was fully deprecated last month and returns 410 Gone responses.
comfygit API v3 migration guide is at docs.comfygit.org/migration/v3. Key breaking changes: authentication moved to OAuth2 PKCE, workflow endpoint renamed from /workflows to /environments.

extracted_items.supersedes_content: comfygit uses Redis for job queue processing
extracted_items.content: comfygit switched from Redis to PostgreSQL-backed queuing using the pgqueue Python library. Processing approximately 500 jobs/day.
comfygit database migrated from AWS RDS to Neon serverless Postgres for cost efficiency with variable workload patterns.
comfygit workflow endpoint renamed to /environments in API v3.
